title: Validate the Loss Aversion pop-up's primary action
description: Test that clicking 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' on the loss aversion pop-up successfully sets the reminder and keeps the trial active.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner.
The 'Remind me' toggle is currently off.

steps.description: 2. On the 'Wait! Don't lose your free days.' pop-up, observe the two actions.
3. Click the high-prominence primary action: 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder'.

expected_result: The pop-up closes, the trial remains active, and the 'Remind me' toggle in the Trial Corner is now enabled. The `remind-me-clicked` event is fired with `page_source` as 'cancel pop-up'.
